title: Upstart (UPST) Q4 Earnings Report Preview: What To Look For
text: Upstart (UPST) reported Q4 2025 earnings showing strong performance despite earlier challenges from Model 22 issues in Q3. Q4 Results: Revenue reached $296.09 million, beating estimates by $7.53 million. EPS Normalized came in at $0.50, beating expectations by $0.03. GAAP EPS was $0.17, beating estimates by $0.02. Full-Year 2025: Total revenue for the full year reached $1.04 billion, representing 64% growth from 2024. Net income was $54 million with adjusted EBITDA of $230 million at a 22% margin. Originations: Transaction volume showed strong growth with 1,497,149 loans originated in Q4, up 115% year-over-year. Auto and home originations accelerated further in Q4 after 5X growth throughout 2025. Strategic Positioning: The company demonstrated recovery from Q3 Model 22 challenges, with strong Q4 execution positioning it well for 2026. Multiple capital partnerships and securitizations were completed to support growth in auto and home lending. Forward Outlook: Management guided for $1.4 billion in 2026 revenue and $294 million in adjusted EBITDA, with continued focus on profitability improvement.
